meaning: n.雷达上显示的点(表示飞机,潜水艇或其他目标的位置)
examples: From today's vantage point, the 1987 crash seems just a blip in the upward progress of the market.
Think about the advent of hedge funds, twenty or twenty-five years ago, hedge funds were a blip on the radar screen.
Is the problem a blip or catastrophe?
Other companies that participated in the Twitter update include Blip.tv, Rdio, SlideShare, and DipDive.
"This is not just a blip, " insists the man behind the run-up, Louis Giuliano .
